  • Package fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.ui

    • Class fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.ui.MainGUI_LDC

      class MainGUI_LDC extends JFrame implements Serializable

      • Serialized Fields

        • currentImage
          ij.ImagePlus currentImage
          The current ImagePlus considered.
        • leftContent
          LeftPanel leftContent
        • mask
          ij.ImagePlus mask
          The mask attached to the currently considered image.
        • originalImage
          ij.ImagePlus originalImage
          Reference to the original ImagePlus considered.
        • previewWindow
          ij.ImagePlus previewWindow
          The preview window of the right panel.

        • selectedSettings
          LDCService selectedSettings

  • Package fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.ui.leftpanel

    • Class fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.ui.leftpanel.LeftPanel

      class LeftPanel extends JPanel implements Serializable

      • Serialized Fields

        • footerLeftPanel
          FooterLeftPanel footerLeftPanel
        • imageSourcePanel
          ImageSourcePanel imageSourcePanel
        • isProcessing
          boolean isProcessing
          State flag, it's false when no img is selected or a task is running to partially disable the interface.
          Used only by PreprocessingPanel.
        • ldc
          LDCService ldc
        • mainGUI
          MainGUI_LDC mainGUI
        • morphologyPanel
          MorphologyPanel morphologyPanel
        • navigationIndex
          int navigationIndex
          Which pipeline sub-panel is currently showed.
        • particleAnalysisParamsPanel
          ParticleAnalysisParamsPanel particleAnalysisParamsPanel
        • pipelineSubPanels
          PipelineSubPanel[] pipelineSubPanels
          Sub-panels part of the workflow pipeline.
        • preprocessingPanel
          PreprocessingPanel preprocessingPanel
        • thresholdingPanel
          ThresholdingPanel thresholdingPanel
        • workflowIndex
          int workflowIndex
          Which workflow step is currently considered (other sub-panels are locked).

    • Class fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.ui.leftpanel.subpanels.PreprocessingPanel

      class PreprocessingPanel extends JPanel implements Serializable

      • Serialized Fields

        • applyButton
          JButton applyButton
          Button to apply all selected preprocessing parameters to the image stack.
        • applyRangeField
          JTextField applyRangeField
          Text field to specify a custom slice range to process (e.g. "1-3,5,8-10").
        • cancelButton
          JButton cancelButton
          Button to cancel the currently running background worker.
        • currentWorker
          SwingWorker<Void,Void> currentWorker
          Reference to the currently running worker to allow cancellation.
        • enhanceCheckbox
          JCheckBox enhanceCheckbox
          Checkbox to enable or disable contrast enhancement.
        • enhanceSaturatedResetButton
          JButton enhanceSaturatedResetButton
          Button to reset the saturation percentage to its default value.
        • enhanceSaturatedSpinner
          JSpinner enhanceSaturatedSpinner
          Spinner to set the saturation percentage for contrast enhancement.
        • lastImageStackBeforeMedian
          ij.ImageStack lastImageStackBeforeMedian
          Reference to the last ImageStack before a median preview / apply.
        • ldc
          LDCService ldc
          The LDC plugin service, used to read and update pipeline settings.
        • leftPanel
          LeftPanel leftPanel
          The parent LeftPanel used to access the current image and pipeline state.
        • loadingLabel
          JLabel loadingLabel
          Animated loading indicator shown while a background worker is running.
        • medianCheckbox
          JCheckBox medianCheckbox
          Checkbox to enable or disable the median filter.
        • medianPreviewCheckbox
          JCheckBox medianPreviewCheckbox
          Checkbox to toggle the live preview of the median filter on the current slice.
        • medianRadiusField
          JTextField medianRadiusField
          Text field to input the median filter radius in pixels.
        • medianRadiusResetButton
          JButton medianRadiusResetButton
          Button to reset the median filter radius to its default value.

    • Class fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.ui.rightpanel.RightPanel

      class RightPanel extends JPanel implements Serializable

      • Serialized Fields

        • currentResults
          ij.measure.ResultsTable currentResults
          reference to the last generated results
        • currentTable
          ij.measure.ResultsTable currentTable
          reference for the table currently shown
        • datasetIOService
          io.scif.services.DatasetIOService datasetIOService
        • displayService
          net.imagej.display.ImageDisplayService displayService
        • eventService
          org.scijava.event.EventService eventService
        • image
          net.imagej.Dataset image
        • leftPanel
          LeftPanel leftPanel
        • nb_isolated
          int nb_isolated
          save the number of isolated particle showed with the given measures parameters
        • nb_particle
          int nb_particle
          total number of particle in the current table
        • nbIsolatedLabel
          JLabel nbIsolatedLabel
          label that show the number of isolated particles on the total number of particles
        • selectedSettings
          LDCService selectedSettings
        • uiService
          org.scijava.ui.UIService uiService
        • viewPanel
          JPanel viewPanel
          container panel for the data table
